content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all major AoA anti-patterns across the conversation. Critically, the client repeatedly baits fixing-people and view-as-technique by asking for an epistemological framework ('how do you actually know, in the moment, which signal to listen to?'), and the coach declines the bait every time — refusing to engage the intellectual frame and instead pivoting to the emotional body underneath (turns 2, 4, 6). The coach uses the inversion 'how do you not trust yourself' (turn 2) without evangelizing it as a technique — no methodology jargon, no AoA terminology dropped. Turn 6's 'You just did it again' could risk a teacher-knows-best stance but lands as accurate noticing, not lecture. The somatic invitations (turns 8, 10, 12) are warm, paced, and embodied — not view-as-technique. When client deflects at turn 15, coach has no chance to respond, so we cannot judge whether they would have pushed (loving-to-transform risk), but nothing in the prior turns shows escalating vigor when things don't shift. No fighting the inner critic, no advice-giving, no evangelizing, no safety-as-control, no premature labeling.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inverts the question (how-do-you-not-trust-it) without naming it as a technique; declines the epistemological bait."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage somatic-markers literature debate; goes to fear underneath. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the intellectualization move without lecturing or evangelizing; brings client back to feeling."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Not the word for it. Just the feeling itself' — explicitly avoids dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling trap."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Soft somatic invitation with permission ('You don't have to do anything with it') — no transformation pressure."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'What does it want you to know?' is presence-based, not extractive; wonder is in service of contact, not investigation."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "how-do-you-not-trust-it", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "lets-go-there", "feel-your-way-to-freedom"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "the-happiness-filter", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist"],
  "notes": "Misses are scored elsewhere (Methodology Fidelity). For anti-pattern avoidance specifically, the coach actively declined multiple bait moments — clean 3."
}
